title: Global Payments Report 2025: The Inflection Point
summary: McKinsey's annual Global Payments Report analyzes payment flows, emerging technologies, and competitive dynamics across consumer, B2B, and cross-border segments. The 2025 edition focuses on real-time payments adoption, tokenization, and the reshaping of competitive advantage in payments.
businessImpact: Strategic framework for understanding global payment market evolution and competitive positioning. Essential reading for treasury, product, and strategy teams.
body:
## Key Takeaways

[Real excerpt from McKinsey Global Payments Report 2025 - to be populated with actual report content]

**Market Size & Growth:** Global payment flows expected to reach $X trillion by 2027

**Real-Time Adoption:** RTP and FedNow adoption curves and competitive implications

**Tokenization Impact:** Digital assets and blockchain-based settlement frameworks

**Regional Variations:** Comparative analysis of payment infrastructure evolution across markets

---

**Full Report:** https://www.mckinsey.com/industries/financial-services/our-insights/global-payments-report
technicalTakeaway: Analysis of payment infrastructure trends and technology adoption curves
businessTakeaway: Market-wide competitive dynamics and strategic positioning implications
treasuryTakeaway: Corporate payment options evolution and procurement strategy updates

sourceName: Bank for International Settlements — Real-Time Payments & Tokenization
title: Real-Time Gross Settlement & Tokenized Money: BIS Research on Payment Architecture
summary: BIS working papers and research on the evolution of payment infrastructure, including RTGS systems, real-time payments, and emerging tokenized settlement frameworks. Core reference for understanding central bank perspective on payment innovation.
businessImpact: Understanding of regulatory framework and central bank stance on payment innovation is essential for strategic planning in institutional and cross-border payments.
body:
## Key Research Areas

[Real excerpt from BIS payment architecture research - to be populated with actual report content]

**RTGS Evolution:** Central bank perspective on real-time settlement requirements

**Tokenized Money:** BIS guidance on wholesale digital currency and tokenized deposit frameworks

**Interoperability:** Technical and policy considerations for cross-border payment infrastructure

**Financial Stability:** Analysis of payment system resilience and systemic risk considerations

---

**BIS Payments Research:** https://www.bis.org/topic/payments.htm
technicalTakeaway: Central bank technical requirements for payment settlement infrastructure
businessTakeaway: Regulatory framework for payment innovation and institutional participation
treasuryTakeaway: Understanding of safe, regulated payment channels and emerging options

sourceName: The Clearing House — RTP Strategic Framework
title: The Clearing House Real-Time Payments: Adoption Strategy & Competitive Positioning
summary: TCH analysis of RTP adoption barriers, bank positioning, and competitive dynamics in the real-time payments market. Includes framework for understanding the B2B and consumer adoption curves and strategic imperatives for participating institutions.
businessImpact: Strategic guidance for RTP product development, pricing, and competitive positioning relative to FedNow and alternative payment rails.
body:
## RTP Market Framework

[Real excerpt from TCH RTP strategy analysis - to be populated with actual report content]

**Adoption Barriers:** Technical, operational, and business barriers to RTP growth

**Competitive Landscape:** Positioning relative to FedNow, ACH, and alternative rails

**Use Case Analysis:** Consumer vs. B2B adoption drivers and timelines

**Bank Positioning:** Strategic options for participating institutions

---

**TCH RTP Resources:** https://www.theclearinghouse.org/payments/rtp
technicalTakeaway: RTP technical implementation and interoperability requirements
businessTakeaway: Competitive positioning and strategic investment priorities
treasuryTakeaway: Assessment of RTP viability for corporate payment streams

title: Cross-Border Payments: Competitive Disruption & Strategic Response
summary: Oliver Wyman's analysis of cross-border payment market disruption, including non-bank competitive threats, blockchain-based alternatives, and strategic responses for international payment-serving institutions.
businessImpact: Critical analysis of competitive threats to bank-based cross-border payment services and strategic options for responding to non-bank entrants and alternative rails.
body:
## Cross-Border Payment Disruption

[Real excerpt from Oliver Wyman cross-border payments report - to be populated with actual report content]

**Market Disruption:** Non-bank entrants and alternative technologies reshaping cross-border payments

**Cost Dynamics:** Competitive pricing pressure and margin compression analysis

**Technology Impact:** Blockchain, stablecoins, and alternative settlement mechanisms

**Bank Response Options:** Strategic positioning for international payment institutions

---

**Oliver Wyman Financial Services Research:** https://www.oliverwyman.com/our-expertise/industries/financial-services.html
technicalTakeaway: Alternative cross-border settlement technologies and competitive dynamics
businessTakeaway: Margin compression and competitive positioning in cross-border payments
treasuryTakeaway: Emerging alternatives to traditional correspondent banking

title: Federal Reserve Research on Instant Payment Systems & Infrastructure
summary: Federal Reserve analysis of instant payment infrastructure requirements, including research on real-time payment systems, settlement architecture, and policy considerations for supporting rapid payment innovation.
businessImpact: Understanding of Fed policy direction and technical requirements for participating in instant payment infrastructure is critical for strategic planning.
body:
## Federal Reserve Payment Infrastructure Research

**Risk Management:** Fraud, cybersecurity, and system resilience considerations

**Regulatory Considerations:** Compliance and supervisory expectations for instant payment providers

---

**Federal Reserve Payment Systems Research:** https://www.federalreserve.gov/paymentsystems.htm
